insights: The market is currently in a clear downward trend, with the current total (936) sitting below both the 7-day and 30-day averages, signaling a lack of momentum.
All tracked company tiers (FAANG+, Unicorn, and Other) show consistent contraction over the last week, suggesting a broad-based reduction in new graduate hiring capacity.
The consistent decline over the last 5 days indicates that the market has not yet reached a floor, supporting a bearish outlook for the next month.
